latest.title: SEAL Team 6 Operator Recounts Rooftop Ambush | Official Preview
latest.desc:
Join this channel to get access to perks:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCkoujZQZatbqy4KGcgjpVxQ/join

Jason “Jay” Magnavice—aka “Jay Maggs”—joins the Shawn Ryan Show to share his 26-year journey as a Navy SEAL, including time at SEAL Team 2 and DEVGRU, multiple deployments to Iraq and Afghanistan
